THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, TONY AKA TONY WILLIAMS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3018 MISSION #38 $3,230.00 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,110.00, LEASE FORFEITED, $3230 INCLUDES $800 MOVING COSTS PAID TO DEFT BY PLTF, WHICH ARE RECOVERABLE PER STIP BECAUSE OF DEFT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ITS TERMS.
